name: Franck MBE
title: Junior Data Analyst
profile: Passionate about data analysis and business insights. Strong expertise in Data Engineering, BI and Azure cloud. Specialized in ETL pipeline design, data modeling and reporting automation. Looking for a permanent position from September 2026 to contribute to high-impact projects.

experiences.title: Data Analyst / Data Engineer
missions: Design and deployment of a datamart for tracking blocked payments, using Star Schema modeling to optimize query times by 30% and facilitate analysis by business teams.
Automation of a recovery team performance dashboard in Power BI, replacing a 2-day monthly manual Excel process, now providing managers with real-time visibility.
Development of complex SQL queries and materialized views in Databricks for dynamic monitoring of payment plans, integrated in real-time into Power BI for accurate and up-to-date reporting.
Implementation of a Databricks access governance system via Microsoft Entra ID and SCIM API, automating user audit and compliance while reducing security risks.
Engineering of a PySpark data pipeline to consolidate financial flows from SAP and Databricks, enabling automated calculation and analysis of the Cash Curve for the finance department.
Orchestration of robust data transformation pipelines via Databricks Jobs, ensuring data reliability and freshness for recovery and finance teams.

experiences.title: Data Analyst
missions: Creation of an interactive analytics application with Streamlit, connected to a MySQL database, providing product teams with a unified view of real-time performance KPIs.
Automation of data cleaning and preparation processes via Python scripts, reducing manual processing time and improving data quality for analysis.
Translation of complex business needs into intuitive dashboards, facilitating strategic decision-making for new feature launches.

experiences.title: Data Engineer
missions: Design and implementation of complete ETL pipelines, from ingestion of heterogeneous sources to data availability in a data lake.
Implementation of the Medallion architecture (Bronze, Silver, Gold) on Azure Data Lake to structure and secure data, ensuring traceability and quality.
Development of semantic models in Microsoft Fabric to feed decision-making dashboards, providing a 360° view of project performance indicators.

experiences.title: Business Analyst
missions: Led analysis of CRM and ERP data to identify growth levers, resulting in optimized marketing campaigns and increased customer retention.
Development and maintenance of KPI dashboards in Power BI, used daily by management to monitor activity and adjust strategy.
Facilitation of scoping workshops with business teams to formalize needs and prioritize developments, ensuring perfect alignment between technical solutions and business challenges.
Design and delivery of BI tool training sessions for operational teams, promoting data culture adoption and user autonomy.

experiences.title: IT Technician
missions: Preventive and corrective maintenance of the company's systems and network infrastructure, ensuring 99.9% service availability.
Deployment and security of workstations, including implementation of backup and security policies to prevent data loss.
On-site technical support for 150 users, with a 95% satisfaction rate on incident resolution.

projects.title: Power BI Recovery Dashboard
projects.description: Automated Power BI dashboard for recovery performance tracking, saving 2h/week for managers.

projects.title: Streamlit KPI App
projects.description: Created an interactive app to visualize product KPIs in real time.
projects.impact: Unified view of indicators for product teams.

certifications.displayText: PL-300 Power BI Data Analyst Associate

contact.cdiMessage: Recruiters, managers or freelance clients: I am available to discuss any permanent contract or data mission opportunities.
